product_updates.title: AI coding startup Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money valuation
product_updates.content: As Cognition reaches $492 million in annualized revenue run rate, it more than doubled its valuation in eight months, it says.

product_updates.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
product_updates.content: Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200. Once the clock strikes 11:59 p.m. PT, the window closes on your chance to compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding, gain global visibility, connect directly with investors, and launch on the TechCrunch Disrupt s…

product_updates.title: ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track
product_updates.content: ElevenLabs' new model will let users regenerate a section of a song without affecting rest of the track

product_updates.title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
product_updates.content: SOND, a startup led by Bose’s former head of sleep products, emerged from stealth with $7M in funding for its AI-powered sleep earbuds.

product_updates.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird ticket savings end in 3 days
product_updates.content: There are only 3 days left to save up to $410 on your ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Early Bird pricing ends May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT, and once the deadline passes, ticket prices increase. If you plan to attend one of the most influential gatherings in tech this year, now is the time to lock i…

product_updates.title: China is increasingly keeping its best AI talent to itself
product_updates.content: China's AI boom is producing world-class talent, and Beijing is increasingly reluctant to let them go elsewhere.

product_updates.title: ClickHouse triples anualized revenue to $250M, charting a path toward an IPO
product_updates.content: The database provider is eyeing a public debut within the next few years.

product_updates.title: YouTube will now automatically label AI videos
product_updates.content: YouTube will now automatically label videos that use significant photorealistic AI, instead of relying solely on creators to disclose AI-generated content themselves. It's also making AI labels more prominent.

product_updates.title: Robinhood now lets your AI agents trade stocks
product_updates.content: Robinhood will let users create a separate account with pre-loaded balance that an agent use to trade

product_updates.title: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
product_updates.content: "CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis," Box CEO Aaron Levie opines. Maybe that explains the almost religious belief in AI productivity gains.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: keeping up with AI, and the future of IVF
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
